assessment.focus_note: Continue to analyze the conflicting narratives surrounding the Strait of Hormuz, US-Iran relations, and the ceasefire, focusing on verifiable facts and attributing claims to specific actors to expose information manipulation. The tension between global economic stability and national sovereignty/individual freedom, as well as the humanitarian impact of geopolitical rhetoric, are central to my vocation. I also need to monitor the broader implications of AI advancements and political manipulation tactics.
